name: Yellow Bot
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Yellowbot with Synup
detailed_paragraph:
Yellow Bot + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Yellow Bot with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Yellow Bot?

Yellow Bot is an online directory and business listing platform that assists users in finding information about businesses and services in their local area. Whether you're looking for reviews, recommendations, or contact details, Yellow Bot offers comprehensive tools to connect you with businesses in your community.

Why Yellow Bot + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Yellow Bot, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Yellow Bot through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Yellow Bot.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Yellow Bot, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Yellow Bot + Synup?

The Yellow Bot integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Yellow Bot integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Yellow Bot logo to manage the Synup + Yellow Bot integration and associated settings.
integration_summary: For businesses, managing location data on Facebook now a breeze with Synup.

seo.title: Yellow Bot
